prices.source_phrase: For active-duty military personnel, adults receive $10 off standard pricing Aquarium admission and children receive $5 off standard pricing Aquarium admission.
prices.source_block: Active-duty U.S. military personnel and their dependents and U.S. military veterans receive a discount off standard pricing Aquarium admission. For active-duty military personnel, adults receive $10 off standard pricing Aquarium admission and children receive $5 off standard pricing Aquarium admission. This discount does not apply to nondependent guests accompanying military personnel. Both active-duty military personnel and their dependents need to show their military ID or military dependent card (orange/red) to receive the discount for themselves and their children.

prices.source_phrase: All members enjoy free daily admission to the Aquarium, as well as discounted Simons Theatre and Whale Watch tickets, gift shop purchases, café purchases, and more.
prices.source_block: All members enjoy free daily admission to the Aquarium, as well as discounted Simons Theatre and Whale Watch tickets, gift shop purchases, café purchases, and more. There are a range membership options, starting at $79. Plus, your annual membership helps support our research and conservation work.

reservation.source_phrase: Book your tickets in advance to ensure entry since weekends and holidays often sell out.
reservation.source_block:
Aquarium Tickets

Book your tickets in advance to ensure entry since weekends and holidays often sell out. Choose tickets for Aquarium admission, a film at Simons Theatre, a whale watch cruise, or a combination.

hours.source_phrase: Spring Hours : Open weekdays from 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. and weekends from 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
hours.source_block:
Each visit to the Aquarium supports our mission to inspire deeper connections to the ocean and actions to protect it.

Spring Hours : Open weekdays from 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. and weekends from 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
